---
title: "Pin Your Locations"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE, message=TRUE, warning=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 

```{r}
library(leaflet)
library(magrittr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(readr)

loc <- read_csv("loc.csv")

leaflet() %>%
addProviderTiles(providers$OpenStreetMap) %>% 
addMarkers(data = loc, lng = loc$lng, lat = loc$lat, popup= loc$name)
 

```

Column {data-width=250}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

###
    
```{r}
knitr::kable(loc[1:2])

sessionInfo()
```
